channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Behind the scenes: The cast and creators prepare for Saturday Night Live UK's debut on Sky
item.description: Saturday Night Live UK, a British adaptation of the iconic American sketch comedy show, is set to premiere on Sky One and Now on 21 March 2026. The article provides an inside look at the preparations,...

item.title: PRASA Initiates Independent Investigation into Alleged Gang Connections in Cape Town Central Line Project
item.description: The Passenger Rail Agency of South Africa (PRASA) has confirmed it will launch an independent review following allegations of irregular subcontracting tied to the Cape Town Central Line recovery proje...

item.title: US Officials Criticise CNN Reporting on Iran Conflict
item.description: On Friday, the Pentagon and White House strongly criticised CNN for its coverage of the ongoing Iran conflict. Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth called one report by CNN 'patently ridiculous' and express...

item.title: Coverage of the 2026 Academy Awards Red Carpet and Key Highlights
item.description: The 2026 Academy Awards kicked off with comedian Conan O'Brien opening the show with his signature humour. Stars from around the world made their way down the red carpet, showcasing a variety of colou...

item.title: Analysing the Symbolism in This Year’s Oscar Contenders
item.description: This article explores the deeper themes and symbolic elements present in this year’s leading Oscar contenders. One highlighted film features twin gangsters returning to Mississippi during the Jim Crow...

item.title: Strategies for Managing Anxiety Throughout Life Stages
item.description: Anxiety is increasingly prevalent in the UK, affecting all age groups from children to older adults. Experts emphasise that anxiety is a natural part of the human stress response, but it can become pr...

item.title: Complete Coverage of the 98th Academy Awards Winners and Highlights
item.description: The 98th Academy Awards concluded with several surprises and historic wins, making the 2026 Oscars one of the most unpredictable ceremonies in recent years. Ryan Coogler's 'Sinners' led the nomination...

item.title: Amy Madigan Wins Best Supporting Actress Oscar for 'Weapons' After 40-Year Gap
item.description: Amy Madigan, a veteran actress, won the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress at the 98th Oscars on March 15, 2026, for her chilling portrayal of Aunt Gladys in the supernatural horror thriller 'W...

item.title: Pope Leo XIV Appeals for Immediate Ceasefire in US-Israel-Iran Conflict
item.description: Pope Leo XIV don make strong appeal for ceasefire for di escalating war wey US and Israel launch against Iran, wey don cause over 2000 deaths including many school girls. For im Sunday post on X, di P...

item.title: Top Six African Countries With Most Affordable Petrol in March 2026
item.description: As global oil prices dey waka up and down because of wahala for some key energy corridors and supply gbege, countries wey sabi hold ground or reduce domestic fuel prices dey enjoy correct economic and...

item.title: Raissa Butkowski selected as Liberal candidate for Farrer byelection
item.description: The NSW Liberal Party has confirmed Albury City councillor and lawyer Raissa Butkowski as their candidate for the Farrer by-election, defeating Lachlan McIntyre, a former staffer of long-serving forme...

item.title: Sanusi Shares How Faith Helped Him Stay Calm After Losing Top Positions

item.description: Energy Secretary Chris Wright addressed the recent spike in U.S. gasoline and diesel prices during an interview on NBC’s 'Meet the Press.' Wright attributed the increases—24% for gasoline and 32% for ...

item.title: Litlhonolofatso Litlhakanyane Wins First Safta with Mentorship from Jerry Mofokeng
item.description: At just 16 years old, Litlhonolofatso Litlhakanyane celebrated a major career milestone by winning his first South African Film and Television Award (Safta) for Best Supporting Actor in a TV Soap for ...
